revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-2-365

Wave interference error (in bearing)

Heiligtag effect (deprecated)

An error arising from the simultaneous reception of two or more waves arriving in different directions from a single transmitter.

Reference: B.S.

{{IALAFooter}}
